tools.name: eslint
tools.fix_command: cd frontend && npx eslint --ext js,ts,tsx src --fix

linting.notes: Pre-commit workflow is DISABLED in CI (on: []). Linting is enforced upstream. Python linting uses Google style guide. Frontend requires no warnings (--max-warnings=0).

testing.run_single_file: pytest {file} (Python), go test {package} (Go), npm run test:ui {file} (Frontend)
testing.run_single_test: pytest {file}::{test_name} (Python), go test -run {TestName} {package} (Go), npm run test:ui -- -t '{name}' (Frontend)

go_backend.run_command: go test -v -cover $(go list ./backend/... | grep -v backend/test/v2/api | grep -v backend/test/compiler | grep -v backend/test/end2end | grep -v backend/test/integration | grep -v backend/test/v2/integration | grep -v backend/test/initialization)

env_vars: SETUP_ENV=false (to skip venv creation in SDK tests)
testing.mock_patterns: Uses standard test mocking patterns per language
testing.notes: Tests are split by component: SDK (Python), backend (Go), frontend (TypeScript). Integration tests and e2e tests require Kubernetes cluster and are excluded from basic unit tests. Frontend has 1654+ unit tests.

gating_checks.name: Frontend Tests
gating_checks.command: cd frontend && npm ci && npm run test:ci

ci.notes: CI checks require 'ok-to-test' label for external PRs. CI Check workflow polls for all checks to pass. Many workflows use path filters to run only on relevant changes. Integration and E2E tests require cluster infrastructure.

build.install_command: go mod download (Go), pip install -r requirements.txt (Python), npm ci (Frontend)
build.build_command: go build ./... (Go), pip install . (Python), npm run build (Frontend)
build.notes: Multi-language monorepo. Backend is Go, SDK is Python, Frontend is TypeScript. Each component has independent build process.

conventions.test_naming: Test* functions (Go), test_* functions (Python), describe/it blocks (TypeScript)
conventions.import_style: Grouped imports per language. Python uses Google style (isort --profile google). Frontend uses ES modules.
conventions.notes: Follows standard conventions for each language. Python adheres to Google Python Style Guide. Go follows standard Go conventions. TypeScript uses ESLint recommended + React rules.

setup_commands: apt-get update && apt-get install -y make git
For Python: pip install -r sdk/python/requirements.txt -r sdk/python/requirements-dev.txt pytest-cov && pip install sdk/python && pip install kubernetes_platform/python
For Frontend: cd frontend && npm ci

lint_commands.notes: Runs successfully, found expected lint issues (errcheck violations)
All files use Prettier code style

test_commands.command: go test -v -cover $(go list ./backend/... | grep -v backend/test/v2/api | grep -v backend/test/compiler | grep -v backend/test/end2end | grep -v backend/test/integration | grep -v backend/test/v2/integration | grep -v backend/test/initialization)
test_commands.notes: Backend unit tests pass, excludes integration/e2e tests
SDK tests pass (11 tests passed), requires kfp and kfp-kubernetes installed

container_recipe.test_single_file: pytest {file} (Python), go test {package} (Go), cd frontend && npm run test:ui {file} (Frontend)
container_recipe.test_single_test: pytest {file}::{test_name} (Python), go test -run {TestName} {package} (Go), cd frontend && npm run test:ui -- -t '{name}' (Frontend)
container_recipe.notes: Multi-language repo requires different containers for each component. Go backend tests fastest to validate. Python SDK requires both kfp and kfp-kubernetes packages. Frontend tests comprehensive (1654 tests). Some tests have FutureWarnings about base_image changes in 2027.

results.notes: Tests run successfully, validated on sample packages

results.output_snippet: backend/src/apiserver/client/workflow_fake.go:115:16: Error return value of `json.Unmarshal` is not checked (errcheck)
results.notes: Linter runs correctly, found legitimate issues (exit 1 expected when issues found)

results.command: pip install -r sdk/python/requirements.txt -r sdk/python/requirements-dev.txt pytest-cov && pip install sdk/python && pip install kubernetes_platform/python

results.notes: SDK tests pass, warnings about future Python 3.12 base_image change

results.output_snippet: added 2586 packages, and audited 2587 packages in 1m
results.notes: Frontend dependencies installed, 88 known vulnerabilities (typical for large JS projects)

results.output_snippet: All matched files use Prettier code style!

Test Files  118 passed (118)
      Tests  1654 passed (1654)
   Duration  49.27s
results.notes: All 1654 frontend tests pass in ~49 seconds

validation.summary: All validation successful: Go backend tests OK, golangci-lint OK (found expected issues), Python SDK tests OK (11 passed), frontend lint OK, frontend format OK, frontend tests OK (1654 passed)

gaps: Integration tests require Kubernetes cluster and external infrastructure (MySQL, MinIO, etc.) - cannot validate in isolated container
E2E tests require deployed KFP system - cannot validate without cluster
Pre-commit hooks disabled in CI (on: []) - enforcement happens upstream only
Python linting not validated in container (would need to run via pre-commit)
API generation commands not validated (require protoc, swagger-codegen, etc.)
Some tests require specific environment setup (GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS, etc.)
notes: This is a mature, well-tested monorepo with comprehensive CI/CD. Unit tests are easily runnable in containers. Linting is well-configured for all languages. Agent can validate patches for Go backend, Python SDK, and TypeScript frontend components independently. Integration/E2E tests require infrastructure but unit tests provide strong signal. Each component (backend, SDK, frontend) can be tested independently in appropriate language containers.
